---
title: "Skills"
---

::: {.column-page}

# Skills & Expertise

A comprehensive overview of my technical skills and areas of expertise.

## Technical Skills

### Programming Languages

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
- **Python** - Advanced
- **SQL** - Advanced (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle)
- **VBA/Excel Scripting** - Advanced
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
- **DAX** - Advanced
- **M (Power Query)** - Advanced
:::

::::

### Python Libraries & Frameworks

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
**Data Analysis & Visualization**
- Pandas - Data manipulation and transformation
- NumPy - Numerical computing
- SciPy - Statistical analysis and testing
- Matplotlib - Data visualization
- Seaborn - Statistical graphics
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
**Other**
- Django - Web framework
- BeautifulSoup - Web scraping
- pdfplumber - PDF data extraction
- Requests - HTTP library
:::

::::

### Business Intelligence & Analytics

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
**Primary Tools**
- **Microsoft Power BI** - Advanced
- **Report Builder** - Advanced
- **Excel** - Advanced (VLookup, Pivot Tables, Conditional Formatting, Data Analysis)
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
**Database Management**
- SQL Server Management Studio
- PostgreSQL
- MySQL
- Oracle
:::

::::

---

## Soft Skills

- **Communication** - Clearly explaining complex concepts
- **Problem-Solving** - Breaking down challenges into manageable parts
- **Teamwork** - Collaborating effectively in diverse environments
- **Leadership** - Mentoring and guiding team members
- **Project Management** - Planning and executing projects efficiently
- **Adaptability** - Learning new technologies and methodologies quickly

---

## Certifications & Badges

- **BSc in Computer Science and Information Technology** - Tribhuvan University, June 2025

---

## Continuous Learning

I'm always expanding my skillset. Currently exploring:

- Advanced statistical modeling and machine learning
- Cloud platforms and data warehouse solutions (BigQuery, Snowflake)
- Advanced Power BI and DAX optimization

---

[Check Out My Projects →](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}

:::
